AUTOMATON-ALLOCATE.description: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Status[/gold] in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ALLOCATE.title: Allocate
AUTOMATON-ASSEMBLY.title: Assembly
AUTOMATON-BACKTRACE.title: Backtrace
AUTOMATON-BATCH.description: Create a Function immediately out of the cards currently [gold]Encoded[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BATCH.title: Batch
AUTOMATON-BIT_SHIFT.description:
Choose an [gold]Encoded[/gold] card to return to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [gold]Retain[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BIT_SHIFT.title: Bit Shift
AUTOMATON-BLOCKCHAIN.title: Blockchain
AUTOMATON-BOOST.title: Boost
AUTOMATON-BRANCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage or gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The option not chosen is [gold]Encoded[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BRANCH.title: Branch
AUTOMATON-BRANCH_ATTACK.title: Branch: Attack
AUTOMATON-BRANCH_BLOCK.title: Branch: Block
AUTOMATON-BREAK.title: Break
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ARMOR.title: Bronze Armor
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ORB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Encode[/gold] a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold] in you [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_ORB.title: Bronze Orb
AUTOMATON-BUGGY_MESS.title: Buggy Mess
AUTOMATON-BUG_BARRAGE.description:
Gain 2 [gold]Wounds[/gold].
[gold]Cycle[/gold] each [gold]status[/gold], dealing {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
AUTOMATON-BUG_BARRAGE.title: Bug Barrage
AUTOMATON-BURN_OUT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for ALL of your [gold]Status[/gold] cards, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them,
AUTOMATON-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
AUTOMATON-BYTE_SHIFT.description:
Return all [gold]Encoded[/gold] cards to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
They gain [gold]Retain[/gold].
AUTOMATON-BYTE_SHIFT.title: Byte Shift
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT.description: Next {ClassDefaultPower:diff()} times you create a Function, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of current card in the first slot.
AUTOMATON-CLASS_DEFAULT.title: Class Default
AUTOMATON-CLEANSE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a random [gold]Status[/gold] card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-CLEANSE.title: Cleanse
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_CODE.description: Remove the next {RemoveErrorsPower:diff()} [gold]Compile Errors[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
AUTOMATON-CLEAN_CODE.title: Clean Code
AUTOMATON-CONSTRUCTOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] as the first card, increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {ExtraBlock:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-CONSTRUCTOR.title: Constructor
AUTOMATON-COPY_PASTE.description:
Play a copy of each [gold]Encoded[/gold] card.
They do not [gold]Encode[/gold].
AUTOMATON-COPY_PASTE.title: Copy Paste
AUTOMATON-CULTIST_STRIKE.title: Cultist Strike
AUTOMATON-CUT_THROUGH.title: Cut Through
AUTOMATON-DEBUG.description: Remove all [gold]Compile Error[/gold] effects from [gold]Encoded[/gold] cards.
AUTOMATON-DEBUG.title: Debug
AUTOMATON-DECOMPILE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Encoded[/gold] cards.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw a card for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
AUTOMATON-DECOMPILE.title: Decompile
AUTOMATON-DEFEND_AUTOMATON.title: Defend
AUTOMATON-DELAYED_GUARD.title: Delayed Guard
AUTOMATON-DEPRECATE.title: Deprecate
AUTOMATON-DEV_TOOLS.title: Dev Tools
AUTOMATON-DIGITAL_CARNAGE.title: Digital Carnage
AUTOMATON-FIND_AND_REPLACE.description:
Select a card from your [gold]Draw[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Add a [gold]Dazed[/gold] where it was.
AUTOMATON-FIND_AND_REPLACE.title: Find and Replace
AUTOMATON-FINE_TUNING.description: Increase all numbers of [gold]Encoded[/gold] cards by 1 except cost.
AUTOMATON-FINE_TUNING.title: Fine Tuning
AUTOMATON-FLAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to All enemies twice.
Gain {ArtifactPower:diff()} [gold]Artifact[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FLAIL.title: Flail
AUTOMATON-FOLLOW_THROUGH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last played card was a Function, play this again.
AUTOMATON-FOLLOW_THROUGH.title: Follow Through
AUTOMATON-FORCE_SHIELD.description:
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each Function created this combat.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FORCE_SHIELD.title: Force Shield
AUTOMATON-FORMAT.title: Format
AUTOMATON-FORTIFY.title: Fortify
AUTOMATON-FOR_LOOP.description: The next card you [gold]Encode[/gold] causes {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} additional copies to also be [gold]Encoded[/gold].
AUTOMATON-FOR_LOOP.title: For Loop
AUTOMATON-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
AUTOMATON-FRONTLOAD.title: Frontload
AUTOMATON-FULL_RELEASE.title: Full Release
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_SKILL_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_POWER_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-FUNCTION_ATTACK_CARD.title: function()
AUTOMATON-GET_LATEST.description:
Gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold].
It costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
AUTOMATON-GET_LATEST.title: Get Latest
AUTOMATON-GOTO.title: Goto
AUTOMATON-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Put 5 [gold]Voids[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-HYPER_BEAM_AUTOMATON.title: HYPER BEAM
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS.description: At the start of your turn, gain a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minor Beam+|Minor Beam}[/gold].
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_BEAMS.title: Infinite Beams
AUTOMATON-INFINITE_LOOP.title: Infinite Loop
AUTOMATON-INVALIDATE.title: Invalidate
AUTOMATON-ITERATE.title: Iterate
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE.description: Whenever you draw or [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] card, gain {ItsAFeaturePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-ITS_A_FEATURE.title: It's a Feature
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY.description:
At the start of your turn, gain a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold].
It costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
AUTOMATON-LIBRARY.title: Library
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
At the start of your turn, draw an additional card and [gold]Insert[/gold] a [gold]Dazed[/gold].
AUTOMATON-MAX_OUTPUT.title: Max Output
AUTOMATON-MERGE_CONFLICT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you [gold]Encode[/gold] a card, [gold]Encode[/gold] a copy of it.
AUTOMATON-MERGE_CONFLICT.title: Merge Conflict
AUTOMATON-MINOR_BEAM.title: Minor Beam
AUTOMATON-MUTATOR.description:
Gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Transform[/gold] a [gold]Status[/gold] into a copy of this.
AUTOMATON-MUTATOR.title: Mutator
AUTOMATON-MUTATOR.selectionScreenPrompt: Pick a [gold]Status[/gold] to transform into this.
AUTOMATON-NULL_POINTER.title: Null Pointer
AUTOMATON-OIL_SPILL.title: Oil Spill
AUTOMATON-OPTIMIZE.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] the next {OptimizePower:diff()} cards you [gold]Encode[/gold] that can be [gold]upgraded[/gold].
AUTOMATON-OPTIMIZE.title: Optimize
AUTOMATON-OVERHEAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove the next [gold]Compile Error[/gold] you would [gold]Encode[/gold].
AUTOMATON-OVERHEAT.title: Overheat
AUTOMATON-PHILOSOPHIZE.title: Philosophize
AUTOMATON-PIERCING_SHOT.title: Piercing Shot
AUTOMATON-RECURSIVE_STRIKE.title: Recursive Strike
AUTOMATON-REFACTOR.description:
[gold]Scry[/gold] {Scry:diff()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards discarded.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card [gold]exhausted.[/gold]
AUTOMATON-REFACTOR.title: Refactor
AUTOMATON-REPAIR.title: Repair
AUTOMATON-REPLICATE.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold], add a copy to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-REPLICATE.title: Replicate
AUTOMATON-REPULSOR.description: When you draw the first [gold]Status[/gold] or [gold]Curse[/gold] card each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw a card.
AUTOMATON-REPULSOR.title: Repulsor
AUTOMATON-RETURN.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
AUTOMATON-RETURN.title: Return
AUTOMATON-ROBO_CHOP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} additional {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:plural:card|cards}.
AUTOMATON-ROBO_CHOP.title: Robo-Chop
AUTOMATON-SAFEGUARD.title: Safeguard
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM.description: Whenever you draw a Function, increase all numbers on it by 1 except for cost.
AUTOMATON-SENTIENT_FORM.title: Sentient Form
AUTOMATON-SEPARATOR.description: When [gold]Encoded[/gold] in the middle, increase its damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
AUTOMATON-SEPARATOR.title: Separator
AUTOMATON-SHIP_IT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Repeat for every [gold]Status[/gold] card in your [gold]Exhaust pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-SHIP_IT.title: Ship It
AUTOMATON-SPAGHETTI_CODE.description:
Choose 1 of 3 random cards to [gold]Encode[/gold].
Repeat until you create a Function.
AUTOMATON-SPAGHETTI_CODE.title: Spaghetti Code
AUTOMATON-STICKY_SHIELD.title: Sticky Shield
AUTOMATON-STRIKE_AUTOMATON.title: Strike
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB.description: Whenever you create or play a Function, gain {SummonOrbPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {SummonOrbPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
AUTOMATON-SUMMON_ORB.title: Summon Orb
AUTOMATON-TERMINATOR.title: Terminator
AUTOMATON-THUNDER_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {BufferPower:diff()} [gold]Buffer[/gold].
AUTOMATON-THUNDER_WAVE.title: Thunder Wave
AUTOMATON-TURBO.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Void[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-TURBO.title: Turbo
AUTOMATON-UNDERVOLT.title: Undervolt
AUTOMATON-VIRUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard your [gold]Hand[/gold] and gain a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minor Beam+|Minor Beam}[/gold] for each card discarded.
AUTOMATON-VIRUS.title: Virus
AUTOMATON-WILD_STRIKE.title: Wild Strike
